title: Adagio Holdings in Need of Salvagers
Adagio Holdings in Need of Salvagers
Preliminary Bounty: ~mission(TargetName)
description:
--------------------------------------------------------
----------------- BOUNTY CONTRACT -----------------
--------------------------------------------------------

BOUNTY HUNTERS GUILD
PROCESSING & DISTRIBUTION

The Bounty Hunters Guild has authorized an official bounty.

NAME: ~mission(TargetName) 
SYSTEM: Stanton
RISK ASSESSMENT: Medium
LAST KNOWN LOCATION:  ~mission(Location|Address)
KNOWN AFFILIATIONS: <None>
NOTES: This preliminary bounty is being offered to you as a formal evaluation of your skills. Successful completion of this contract will lead to additional bounty work being made available. 

It is believed that the target will be on foot and well armed, so be prepared to engage in a firefight. Additionally, there may be other hostiles forces at the site, while they should not be your primary focus, you may have to engage with them while in pursuit of the target.


BOUNTY HUNTERS GUILD
In Pursuit of Justice

The Bounty Hunters Guild is a security service sanctioned by the Mercenary Guild and authorized to operate in both the UEE and beyond in accordance with Xenotrade Authority Acts.

title: Reclusive Bounty: ~mission(TargetName) | High Risk
description:
--------------------------------------------------------
-------------- BOUNTY CONTRACT ---------------
--------------------------------------------------------

BOUNTY HUNTERS GUILD
PROCESSING & DISTRIBUTION

The Bounty Hunters Guild has authorized an official bounty.

NAME: ~mission(TargetName) 
RISK ASSESSMENT: High
LAST KNOWN LOCATION:  ~mission(Location|Address)
KNOWN AFFILIATIONS: Unknown
NOTES: This particular target has proven very difficult to capture. They tend to remain hidden unless there is a big enough threat to demand their attention. That's why you and your support crew will need to take out enough of their underlings to catch their ire. Just stay put, take out any hostiles that show up, and the target should eventually show themselves.


BOUNTY HUNTERS GUILD
In Pursuit of Justice

The Bounty Hunters Guild is a security service sanctioned by the Mercenary Guild and authorized to operate in both the UEE and beyond in accordance with Xenotrade Authority Acts.

title: Clear Outlaw Data Center
description:
After several attempts at convincing the outlaws at ~mission(Location|Address) to stop their assaults on Citizens for Prosperity aligned settlements, we have decided on a new course of action.

We want you to wipe out all the records they are storing on their servers. This setback should force them to reconsider their actions, or at the very least, give us time to assess further options.

Thanks,
 
Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Danger: Contraband Weapons Inbound
description:
This is a general warning. We have learned that the Headhunters are transporting a large amount of weapons into the system with the intent of launching attacks against CFP-owned settlements.

While we believe that change can only come to this system through nonviolence. The presence of these weapons will undoubtedly cause considerably more bloodshed and devastation so we want to remove them from the equation.

Any of our supporters with appropriate combat training are asked to undertake this dangerous assignment out near ~mission(Location|Address). We will compensate you for the tremendous risk you are taking.

Thank you and be safe out there,

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: First Haul in System
description:
Welcome to the system, not sure if you're familiar with our organization but Citizens for Prosperity are a non-profit organization dedicated to bringing security and civilization to unclaimed systems.

If you're looking for work in the system and would like to help achieve our goal, we need a package picked up from <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and taken to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

Once complete, we can offer you a variety of new job opportunities in this system and beyond.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Help Deal with Outlaw Hunting Party
description:
Recently we've had incident reports of numerous Citizens for Prosperity contractors in the system having run-ins with an outlaw hunting party operating out of ~mission(Location|Address). 

To help re-establish safer routes through that sector, you will be dispatched to head there and engage with these outlaws. The group is known to travel in smaller packs, so its important that you and whatever backup you bring wait in the area to deal with all of them or else there's a chance the threat will remain. 

Thank you for helping us,
Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Intercepted Supply Run
description:
Life is tough on the frontier, and every delivery to our settlers is important. We really can't afford to lose any more this year.

One of our key suppliers has been hit by a group of outlaws over at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and gone silent on us. I fear the worst, but if we can still recover the supplies they were transporting, it could make a huge difference.

Chances are the outlaws who attacked them are still lurking around there so be on your guard. Once you've dealt with them, grab the cargo and take it to the freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>. Make sure you're flying a ship that can carry <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4> and bring a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> too.

Fly safe out there,

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Missing: ~mission(TargetName)
description:
Citizens for Pyro is concerned about one of our local contractors, ~mission(TargetName). They finished up a trade at ~mission(Location|Address) and haven’t been seen since. We’re hearing reports that outlaws have been frequenting the area, so I suspect that the worst might have happened.

Either way, ~mission(TargetName|Last) has done good work for us in the past and I’d hate for them to wind up as just another one of the system's missing. If you’re willing to find them for me, I’ll see that you get a reward.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Patrol Travel Lanes
description:
We need someone with combat experience to patrol a travel lane for us. Over the years, we’ve found that it's good to get out there and make ourselves visible. Sometimes a pilot like yourself traveling through an area is enough to deter any potential outlaws. But in case you run into any that are feeling a bit more ambitious, a ship ready for combat is recommended.

Once you’ve accepted this contract, make your way to the <EM4>location marker</EM4> on your HUD. After you’ve scanned all the waypoints and ensured that the route is secure, the main contractor will get a bonus of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) MG Scrip.</EM4>


Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Protection against ~mission(TargetName|Last)
description:
Reports indicate that ~mission(Location|Address) has come under attack from a group of armed individuals led by a notorious outlaw named ~mission(TargetName). There have been multiple reported deaths and injuries, so Citizens for Prosperity has been looking for qualified combat operatives to provide some support. 

Though we don't advocate conflict resolution through violence, we believe that the group will disperse if ~mission(TargetName|Last) is not there to lead them.

Head over as soon as you can. Lives are on the line.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Search Outpost for Our Supplies
description:
Hi,

Bunch of basic goods needed at ~mission(Destination|Address) were stolen while in transit. Got a tip that the supplies were taken to ~mission(Location|Address). Can you head there and reclaim them for us? 

The place is allegedly abandoned, but looks can be deceiving. My advice, prepare for the worst but hope for the best. 

Also, to make your life easier, I'd make sure you have a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> with you. 

Thanks,

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Seeking Experienced Combat Pilots
description:
Citizens for Prosperity is in need of pilots with dogfighting experience. If you’re looking to put your skills to the test, I have a mission here for you to try. 

A civilian ship has requested combat support near <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. Head there and show us that you have the skills to excel in these types of missions and we’ll put you to good use.  

Please be aware. This mission is not a training exercise. This is a real encounter, so please do your best to save the ship in distress. 

Good Luck,

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

title: Armor with horn and string
description:
Hello, know many humans want saldynium for regen problem. Credits good, yes, but Wikelo can use that, kopion horn, and other things to make special armor. 

Once done, you be very tough. Very scary.

You see items needed. Bring to <EM4>~mission(destination|ListAll)</EM4> and I make for you.

Bye.

title: Demolition Mission
description:
I’m looking to send a strong message to the crew over at ~mission(Location|Address) and know the perfect way to do it - property damage.

All you need to do is head on over, destroy a few things here and there, and really drive home an important lesson about respecting your betters. 

Do that for me and I’ll be feeling very happy. And generous.

Interested?

title: Easy Pickings
description:
Get this, we were sifting through some comms and picked up some excitement about a big score. It was easy work to figure out where they're hiding a ship loaded with cargo and we figured, hey, why keep this profitable knowledge to ourselves? 

Send us a few creds in finder fees and we'll send you the coordinates of the asteroid base where the ship is stashed. It’s locked inside a hangar, so you’ll need to get to it via the station’s elevators. But once inside, you’ll be able to override the lockdown at a console. Do that and it should be easy pickings.

57 65 65 76 69 6c

title: Inmate Maintenance Opportunity
description:
Hello Guests,

We have recently been alerted that one of our Oxygen Dispensers has suffered a technical error. As you know these kiosks are vital to ensure that you have plenty of oxygen handy while participating in our Work Release Program.

We are looking for any available guest to reset the kiosk. That should reconnect the kiosk to the network and resolve the issue. The first guest who's able to complete this task will not only be compensated with merits, but also with the satisfaction that they're making the workplace safer for other guests.

Thank you.

title: RESOURCE DRIVE: HAULER REQUIRED
description:
HURSTON DYNAMICS OUTSOURCING
CONTRACT: Resource Drive
OUTSOURCE MANAGER: A. Carmichael
RISK ASSESSMENT: Low

To solve the regen crisis, the Empire has put out a call for resources and Hurston Dynamics intends to answer. Whichever company donates the most wins government sponsored benefits, and we have no intention of losing.

As a first assignment, you are being tasked with making a small cargo delivery. More lucrative and complex work will follow the successful completion of this contract.

This assignment requires a ship that can carry <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4> and a <EM4>multi-tool with a tractor beam attachment</EM4>. Once you finished your preparations, head to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>, collect the cargo from the freight elevator, and deliver it to a freight elevator at: <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address|ListAll)</EM4>.

The Second Life initiative requires us to publicly declare Hurston’s contributions. This information, along with the other corporations' contributions is available in the <EM4>Second Life Resource Drive</EM4> section of your Journal. Be aware that milestone bonuses are available for contractors who fulfil delivery quotas.


** The information transmitted may contain confidential and/or privileged material. Any review, retransmission, dissemination or other use of or taking action in reliance upon this information by persons or entities other than the intended recipient is prohibited. **

title: Wrecked Ships for Sale
description:
Had a few wrecked ships towed to ~mission(Location|Address). They’re fully out of commission and in dire need of scrapping. If you’re interested in salvaging what’s left, it can be all yours, for a fair price, too.

Plus, you don’t have to worry much about any distractions while you’re workin’ since you’ll be near one of our stations and we make sure folks behave themselves.

- Smokey

title: Extra Small Covalex Shipment Needs Recovering
description:
Hi,

So I had a contractor who was supposed to deliver some stuff for us but has completely gone off the radar. I've pinged their ship and I've got no idea what's happened but they're floating around somewhere over at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. If you could head over there recover the cargo and take it to the freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4> you'd be doing me a huge favor.

Don't forget to bring a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> to move all the cargo. Oh and a ship that can transport <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4>.

~mission(Contractor|SignOff)

Ella Tieno 
Jr. Logistics Coordinator 
Covalex Shipping   
'Anything you need, anywhere you need it.' 







Covalex Shipping is a limited liability corporation. To encourage timely deliveries and prevent fraud on cargo hauls, Covalex Shipping will set a delivery time limit and upon expiration, any undelivered cargo will be considered stolen and treated as such. Total payment will be prorated according to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered.

title: Med. Distance Covalex Delivery Stanton
description:
Hi,

Looking for a contractor with a ship that can carry <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4> to run a delivery for us across Stanton.

This isn't a particularly long delivery route, but you will be moving between couple of different locations. To make sure things go smoothly, bring enough fuel and a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> to speed up moving the boxes.

~mission(Contractor|SignOff)

Ella Tieno
Jr. Logistics Coordinator
Covalex Shipping
'Anything you need, anywhere you need it.'







Covalex Shipping is a limited liability corporation. To encourage timely deliveries and prevent fraud on cargo hauls, Covalex Shipping will set a delivery time limit and upon expiration, any undelivered cargo will be considered stolen and treated as such. Total payment will be prorated according to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered.

title: Opportunity for Independent Cargo Hauler
description:
Earning such accolades as 'Imperial Finances' Top 10 Shipping Companies' and 'Delivery Digest's 2945's Most Trusted Transport,' Covalex is busier than ever. And that means more cargo going to more places. That's where you come in.  

Covalex is looking for dependable and industrious pilots to join our expanding family. Do you have access to a ship that can hold <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4>? Can you pass an Advocacy background check if required? Then a universe of opportunity is waiting for you. 

Simply complete an 'Evaluation Trial’ by picking up a shipment of <EM4>~mission(Item)</EM4> from a freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and successfully delivering it to a freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

Upon satisfactory completion, you'll be eligible to become part of Covalex Shipping's vast network of independent transport specialists*.

By the way, we strongly encourage contractors to bring a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> along.   


Covalex Shipping  
'Anything you need, anywhere you need it.'







*Covalex Shipping is a limited liability corporation. To encourage timely deliveries and prevent fraud on cargo hauls, Covalex Shipping will set a delivery time limit and upon expiration, any undelivered cargo will be considered stolen and treated as such. Total payment will be prorated according to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered.

title: DEAD SAINTS - Trial Cargo Haul
description:
Call me Twitch. I run the Dead Saints. 

I doubt this is the first time you've heard of us, but in case you haven't, we do a lot of things, but one of them is transporting goods that need discreet handling. 

I got your info from one of my contacts. They say you've got the stuff we like in a hauler, which works for me, because we're looking for one. 

Here's my proposal – we're offering creds to the pilot that can transport some special cargo for us. Your ship’s hold will need room for <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4>, and you'll need a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> for loading and unloading. All you have to do is get everything from <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4> without getting security involved. 
 
If you can pull the job off, the Saints will have more contracts for you down the line. 

-Twitch

title: Finishing The Job
description:
One of my haulers has run into some trouble over at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and was forced to ditch their ship. I need someone to go there with <EM4>a heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> to grab the cargo and finish the job.

They were carrying a decent supply of gear for me, and the last thing I need is for some do-gooder to come across it and trace it back to us.

If you do run into anybody, no need to be friendly. Just shoot the asshole and get my gear. Understood?

Take it to the freight elevator over at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4> and I’ll make sure you get a cut of the sale.

-Twitch

title: Capture Arlington Gang Member Les Arlington
description:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Group Warrant
CONTRACTOR STATUS: Independent
Approval code: = ~mission(Contractor|ApprovalCode)

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

*********
  Background Information  
A group warrant has been issued for the notorious Arlington ship jacking gang after their recent brazen attempted theft of an Idris from a repair yard. While the heist was stopped, the members of the group have scattered to the black. Eckhart Security has been granted the bounty for the immediate capture of all high-level gang members: Maltrox Arlington, Kass Dent, Nicks Cantwell,  Sam ‘Weepy’ Arlington, Oslo Arlington, and Les Arlington.
*********

An anonymous comm has tipped us off that Les Arlington, child of gang leader Maltrox Arlington, had been spotted picking up a delivery at a Covalex transfer center. We will provide you with the coordinates of where we believe their current whereabouts are.

Les is an experienced pilot who has been flying for almost as long as they’ve been walking and usually serves as the gang’s get-away pilot. It may be worthwhile to bring extra support ships in order to cut off any attempts at escape.

You are authorized to use whatever force is necessary to neutralize the target. 

Payment will be issued upon successful completion of contract.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.

title: Low Risk Cargo Retrieval
description:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Recover Cargo
Approval code: = ~mission(ApprovalCode)

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

One of my clients was in the process of transporting some cargo when they came under fire from a group of outlaws. We haven't been able to contact the crew onboard, but trackers indicate the cargo remains intact.

We need a contractor to head to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>, recover the cargo, and deliver it to the freight elevator located at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>. A ship that can store <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4> and a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> are essential for this. Presently, we're not detecting any hostiles, but that could change by the time you've arrived.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.

title: Low Risk Protection Detail
description:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Escort Ship
Approval code: = ~mission(ApprovalCode)

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

A client has requested a contractor with immediate availability to provide extra support to a number of ships leaving an asteroid base located at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>). Once you’ve accepted, rendezvous there and await further instructions. In this instance, your job is to provide support for their safe passage. Hostiles may be present, but they shouldn’t be too challenging to deal with.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.

title: New Opportunity - Ambush Strike
description:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Ship Ambush
APPROVAL CODE = ~mission(ApprovalCode)

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

We’re looking for contractors with combat experience who are willing to get their hands dirty so to speak. A client of ours was double-crossed by a <EM4>~mission(AmbushTarget)</EM4> and we’ve been waiting for an opportunity to deal with the issue. After tracking them for several weeks, we’ve identified <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> as the ideal spot to intercept them. It features an <EM4>emission cloud</EM4> where you can hide and power down your ship while waiting for the <EM4>~mission(AmbushTarget)</EM4>.

Intel suggests that they may travel with an escort. If they do, you’ll have to deal with them too. Since this is your first contract, we will have other contractors in the area who can lend a hand once you strike.

Payment will be issued upon successful completion of contract. There’s a bonus payment of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) MG Scrip</EM4> in this for the main contractor too.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.

title: PURGE ASD SERVERS
description:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Destroy Server
APPROVAL CODE = VS-14

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

A client has asked us to infiltrate an old ASD research site and wipe the contents of a few specific servers there.

We believe the servers are located somewhere within the <EM4>Xenotech Lab, in the Research wing</EM4>. The client has also informed us that despite the facilities being publicly declared as closed, you're still likely to find hostile forces there.

Payment will be issued upon successful completion of contract.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.

title: Save Ship
description:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Defend Ship
APPROVAL CODE = ~mission(ApprovalCode)

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

A client is reporting trouble near <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. Based on their comms, it doesn’t sound like an organized, professional attack. Still, we’re paid to provide protection and it’s been requested. 

Need a contractor to fly there and secure the situation.

Payment will be issued upon successful completion of contract.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.

title: Security Contractor Reevaluation
description:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Trial - Defend Location
APPROVAL CODE = ~mission(ApprovalCode)

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

Eckhart Security is continuing to evaluate potential new contractors. According to our records, you’ve previously attempted a trial contract. We understand how demanding and unpredictable this line of work can be, and would like to give you another chance at completing a qualifying contract. 

If interested, report to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> ready to defend it from an incoming assault by outlaws. Successfully complete this contract to receive payment and more work opportunities from Eckhart Security.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.

Yellow Level Contract: Clear Shipjacking Group
description:
There's a small group of criminals that have been marking their territory, striking out any freighters that get close enough. They got a little too greedy though, because now someone's paying us to go deal with them.

Once you and whoever you're bringing are ready, go to ~mission(Location|Address) and engage with these criminals. Since they like to fly in separate packs, be sure you wait around to clear every last one of them out.
 
Good luck,

Marcus Clenn
Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.

title: Yellow Level Contract: Limiting Potential Threat
description:
A bunch of outlaws have been harassing our client and recently things have taken a turn for the worse. They've taken over their property and we've exhausted all other options.

We need a decent pilot to head to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and take out their fuel tanks. If you can cut off their supplies, you can pave the way for the client to take back their property.

This shouldn't be a tough one. You might run into a ship or two and maybe a few turrets, but you've been authorized to use lethal force. All we need for you to do is get in there, get the fuel tanks, and get out.

Good luck,

Kevin Walton
Dispatcher, Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.

title: Yellow Level Contract: Ship Under Attack
description:
Foxwell is looking for an available combat pilot to provide immediate assistance to a ~mission(Ship) under attack over by ~mission(Location|Address). We have not identified the perpetrators in the attack, but have been assured it is a small force.

Please dispatch quickly and clear out all hostiles. We need the client to make it through this as they haven't paid us yet.

Good luck,

Marcus Clenn
Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.

title: ENTRY LVL. COURIER NEEDED IN STANTON
description:
AVAILABLE FTL CONTRACT
FOR IMMEDIATE ASSIGNMENT

**CONTRACT DETAILS** 
A reliable and hardworking entry-level courier is needed to ferry a delivery in Stanton.
You will be responsible for providing your own transportation.
Interested contractors need the <EM4>ability to lift up to .25 SCU boxes</EM4>.
Contractors are employed on an independent basis and therefore not covered by FTL's company insurance.

~mission(Contractor|SignOff)

title: ~mission(Contractor|RecoverSpaceTitleIntro)
description: ~mission(Contractor|RecoverSpaceDescriptionIntro)

title: Eliminate Annoyance
description:
Headhunters flying in and out of <EM4>~mission(DefendLocationWrapperLocation|Address)</EM4> are being harassed by some aggressive upstarts. Need them dealt with before they become a real pain in the ass.   

Get there and I’ll update you on what these pests are doing so you can hunt ‘em down. 

Clear ‘em all out I’ll throw <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) Council Scrip</EM4> to whoever accepted this gig as a bonus.

- Stows

title: Grab ‘n’ go
description:
Just got word of an abandoned ship with a fat stack of cargo ripe for the pluckin’. If you’re interested, you’ll need to head to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. Word might have gotten around, so there’s probably some skags hanging around, but just ghost them and get the stash.

Bring the cargo to the freight elevator at ~mission(Destination|Address) and I’ll get you your creds.

Make sure you got a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> on you too, no idea how big or small that cargo is.

Stows out.

title: Ground The Upstarts
description:
Headhunters didn't get to be what it is today by playing nice. We've tracked down the hideout of a bunch of scraggy upstarts that have been making inroads into our territory. Need you to send a message.

Head to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and blow the crap out of their fuel tanks. They'll think twice about muscling in on our operations when their ships are grounded.

-Stows out

title: Hauling ask.
description:
You been doing good work for us, so I got a favor to ask. I'll still pay you, but it's a favor. Got some cargo that needs to get bounced from <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4> and the guy that was supposed to do it found himself on the wrong side of an airlock, but hey, shit still needs to get done.

Only thing is you'll need a ship that can carry <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4>.  A <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> would also be smart to bring along. 

If you could sort it out for me, that'd be great.

- Stows out

title: Help Headhunters Prospect
description:
Guess some folks just can’t dogfight. Sent a young prospect out on patrol, and am now being barraged with comms about how they’re barely hanging on. Had them update me with the details about who they’re up against and I damn near fell outta my chair laughing.    

If this kid can’t handle a People’s Alliance ship, they sure ain’t ready for flight assignments. Appreciate it if you could save their hide anyway.

If you’re free, could you head over to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and show ‘em how it’s done?

-Stows

title: Keep ~mission(Location) Safe
description:
I won't bore you with the nitty gritty, but trust me when I say that <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> is important to the Headhunters. So imagine how pissed I am to learn that they're being harassed by some aggressive upstarts who are hellbent on taking out their <EM>~mission(Objects)</EM4>. It won't stand.   

Get there and provide some protection before everything gets destroyed, including <EM4>any friendly ships</EM4> in the area. Nullbrains like these hopefully won't pose too much of a challenge to a rising star like yourself.

Clear ‘em all out I’ll throw <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) Council Scrip</EM4> to whoever accepted this gig.

- Stows

title: Keep ~mission(Objects) Safe From Upstarts
description:
You don't need all the details, but Headhunters have an interest in what happens over at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and I just got word they're being harassed by some aggressive upstarts. 

The dumb sods are trying to cripple the place by taking out their <EM>~mission(Objects)</EM4>. I'm not having it.   

Get there and provide some protection before everything gets destroyed. These chumps are lightweights so shouldn't be too much of a problem for you to handle. 

Clear ‘em all out I’ll throw <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) Council Scrip</EM4> to whoever accepted this gig as a bonus.

- Stows

title: See What’s Out There
description:
Headhunters want some intel on what’s happening around territory. We’ve already set up some monitoring satellites, but nothing beats a good ol’ patrol. You up for it?

If so, get on over to the <EM4>location marker</EM4> on your HUD. Start by scanning that region and then we’ll guide you to a few more spots that we want info on. 

And if you needed some extra motivation, there's a bonus of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) Council Scrip</EM4> for the main contractor at the end of the job. 

- Stows

title: Steal Some ~mission(Item)
description:
We’re getting ready to take our ops in Stanton to the next level. Our scouts tracked an outlaw ship that unloaded some <EM4>~mission(Item)</EM4> at an old Hathor platform facility at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. Whole thing feels like a prime target for a raid. 

Need someone to hit the site, grab the <EM4>~mission(Item)</EM4> stashed there, and bring it to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>. That old Hathor facility is buzzing with activity. Go in unprepared and you’ll regret it. 

- Stows

title: Sticky Fingers
description:
Headhunters are always on the lookout for talented folks that can quickly and discreetly acquire items that we have our eye on. If that’s you, I’ve got a job that should test your skills. Ace it and I have plenty more I can start sending your way.  

There’s a crate of ~mission(Item) currently at ~mission(Location|Address). Go liberate it from its current owners and deliver it to ~mission(Destination|Address). Should be quick and easy. 

- Stows

title: Wanna be a Headhunter?
description:
You know us. You know what we do. System’s getting a little crowded, so we’re looking for some good soldiers to help keep our place here.

If you’re up for it and don’t mind getting your hands dirty, we’ve got something to prove you’ve got the stuff we’re looking for.

~mission(TargetName) was a former member who sold us out to XenoThreat and got some of their brothers and sisters killed. Now they think they can just live their life without consequence.

You take them out. You get boosted in. Sounds like a fair trade.

They’ve been spotted around ~mission(Location|Address), so get there and take care of it.

Stows out.

title: ~mission(Contractor|PrisonerBreakTitle)
description: ~mission(Contractor|PrisonerBreakDescription)

title: Kopion Culling Request
description:
We’ve recently received reports from our team in <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>, that a particularly virile pack of kopions are causing a surge in numbers. As a result, their prey is being over hunted, and if left unattended, will ultimately lead to the starvation of the kopion population there.

We are looking for a skilled contractor to cull this pack of kopions in a swift and efficient manner, assisting with bringing a natural equilibrium back to <EM4>~mission(Location)</EM4>. Access to combat equipment, transport, and a familiarity with wild and unpredictable animals are all required for this job.

For further details on the targeted creatures, please refer to <EM4>"The Guide to Stanton Wildlife"</EM4> in your Journal.

Best,

Wanda Werkheiser
Contract Manager
Highpoint Wilderness Specialists

title: Jorrit Dossier: Lab Sample
description:
Hockrow Agency 
Case File #JD10285
Lead Investigator: Arken Mallor

Case Update: 
In going through the files, I’ve seen a couple of allusions to a specific lab sample that would potentially be useful to have our people analyze. Not sure where it is exactly, but if you hunt around Onyx Facility you should be able to find the sample and bring it to me.

Contract Investigator Actions:
Explore the <EM4>Onyx Facility Research Wing</EM4> and <EM4>track down the Lab Sample</EM4> and deliver it to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

Additional Notes:
Be wary of possible hostile forces on site. 

Travel to Onyx in a vehicle that can be stored in a large hangar.

title: Jorrit Dossier: Onyx Personnel Files
description:
Hockrow Agency 
Case File #JD10285
Lead Investigator: Arken Mallor

Case Summary: 
A client has requested that Hockrow compile a complete dossier on infamous scientist <EM4>Dr. Logan Jorrit</EM4>. Believed responsible for the incidents at Associated Science & Development’s Lazarus site, the client is eager to get a broader view of Dr. Logan and his research.

Contract Investigator Actions: 
Gain access to ASD’s shuttered <EM4>Onyx Facility</EM4> where Dr. Jorrit was formerly the Lead Scientist.  Once there, locate and <EM4>access the research lab’s personnel files</EM4> so that we can get an overview of what was going on there.

Additional Notes:
The QT beacon to the site was deactivated when the facility went dark so you'll have to fly the last leg manually.

While ASD has formally closed the facility, caution is still advised. Not only may the labs themselves be hazardous, but the surrounding area shows signs of recent visitors. Scavengers or squatters may be on site.

I've also managed to wrangle an employee ID code for you so as long as you're on the job, you'll be able to access the computers there. 

Additionally, Onyx Facility only has large hangars available, so plan your travel appropriately.

title: Defend InterSec Operative
description:
MISSION SPECS

Area of Operation: Nyx System 
Hostile Forces: Outlaws
Equipment Specs: Combat-rated Ship 
Briefing: Require urgent assistance for an InterSec operative who is currently under fire at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>.

A group of outlaws had previously taken our operative captive with the intention of extracting sensitive information from them, but miraculously they were able to escape. Unfortunately, the pursuing outlaws now have them pinned down.

Due to the number of the ships assaulting them, we're offering additional compensation to accommodate the added danger. <EM4>Recruiting additional ships</EM4> to support you in this mission is highly advised.

Respectfully,   

Deacon Tobin 
Operations Manager 
InterSec Defense Solutions

title: New Defense Contract: ~mission(TargetName) Elimination
description:
MISSION SPECS

Area of Operation: Nyx System
Hostile Forces: Outlaws
Equipment Specs: Combat-rated Ships
Briefing: InterSec has been hired to combat the rising number of outlaws using Nyx as a staging ground for their operations, with the intention of attacking neighboring UEE systems.

As a preventative measure, we require you to travel to <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and eliminate the ringleader <EM4>~mission(TargetName)</EM4> to deter their planned attack on Stanton. They and their crew are highly dangerous and you are <EM4>advised  to bring a wingman</EM4> for support.

Contractors who can prove themselves reliable and competent in executing operations will be eligible for future missions with InterSec.

Respectfully,

Deacon Tobin
Operations Manager
InterSec Defense Solutions

title: Patrol Dangerous Sector
description:
MISSION SPECS

Area of Operation: Nyx System
Hostile Forces: Outlaws
Equipment Specs: Combat-rated Ships
Briefing: InterSec has received intelligence that outlaws are planning to launch an attack on a target within the UEE. In an effort to prevent this from happening, we need a contractor to patrol a sector we believe these outlaws are using to prepare for their attack.

Outlaw activity in this sector is higher than normal, so InterSec recommends that you <EM4>bring backup</EM4>. When ready, dispatch to the <EM4>location marker</EM4> on your HUD and scan the waypoints along the route. Once you've confirmed that the entire sector is clear, the main contractor will receive a bonus of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) MG Scrip.</EM4> 

Respectfully,

Deacon Tobin
Operations Manager
InterSec Defense Solutions

This communication consists of a non-binding offer that upon acceptance may be immediately terminated by either party without any given notice. All operations are conducted at the contractor’s own personal risk and must adhere to system law where applicable.

title: Recover Vanduul Corpses
description:
MISSION SPECS

Area of Operation: Nyx System
Hostile Forces: Outlaws present and armed
Equipment Specs: <EM4>Cargo Capable Ship</EM4>, Personal Arms, <EM4>Heavy-Duty Tractor Beam</EM4>
Briefing: 
Our latest intel shows that the Shattered Blade have replenished their stock of Vanduul corpses and will shortly be transferring them from the old <EM4>QV Logistics station</EM4>they're operating from to an interested buyer. The UEE can't have another incident like what happened with ASD so they're eager for us to <EM4>recover the cryopods</EM4> and deliver them to <EM4>the freight elevator at ~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

While the Shattered Blade members present at the site might offer resistance, they are not the focus of you mission. Deal with them as needed and get the cryopods. 

Respectfully,

Deacon Tobin
Operations Manager
InterSec Defense Solutions

title: Tactical Strike Group Needed
description:
MISSION SPECS

Area of Operation: Nyx System 
Hostile Forces: Shattered Blade
Equipment Specs: Strike Group
Briefing: 
We've received word that a People's Alliance security ship called Tranquility stumbled across  Shattered Blade hiding out in an old QV Extraction station. Details are sketchy but will connect you with local assets once on site. 

Intersec is looking for a team to intervene and protect the Tranquility and their personnel. Based on discussions with the Tranquility's captain, you will <EM4>need  ballistic and ordnance to break down the defenses of the station</EM4> and ultimately <EM4>get boots on the ground to save their pilot</EM4>.

<EM4>Recruiting additional ships</EM4> to support you in this mission is absolutely critical. You will <EM4>need a variety of ship types</EM4> to balance multiple combat zones in space and on the ground.

Respectfully,   

Deacon Tobin

InterSec Defense Solutions

Hostile Forces: Outlaws

Briefing: An outlaw fleet lead by <EM4>~mission(TargetName)</EM4> has been planning a major strike against vital UEE infrastructure. InterSec has been tasked with dealing with this threat before their attack can be launched.

description:

Area of Operation: Nyx System
Hostile Forces: Unknown
Equipment Specs: Combat-rated Ship, Personal Arms
Briefing: InterSec has been enlisted by the UEE to gather intel on a group of <EM4>black marketeers dealing in Vanduul parts</EM4>, that have been linked to the illegal Vanduul experiments happening at ASD’s Onyx Facility. The UEE is eager to understand and put an end to their operations.

Based on evidence extracted from the ASD facilities, we’ve potentially managed to track down the location of one of their storage sites.

title: Cargo Hauling Opportunity with Ling Hauling
description:
Hi,  
 
This is Petra Ling, and I’m proud to offer you a new and exciting opportunity to partner with Ling Family Hauling. When my parents started this company, their goal was to provide fast and reliable courier deliveries around the greater Crusader area. It quickly became a success, and as our reputation grew, so did our operations.  
 
Now, under my stewardship, Ling Family Hauling is taking the next big step – cargo hauling. Demand for this new service is growing faster than I expected, and that’s great news for both of us.   
 
If you’ve ever wanted to be a hauler, then I can make your dreams come true. Best way to learn something is by doing it, and I’ve got a haul of <EM4>~mission(Item)</EM4> that needs to go from <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.  

No prior experience is necessary, but here’s a few things to keep in mind. All pick-ups and deliveries must be done at a freight elevator or autoloaded. You will need a ship that can hold <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4>, and a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> to move them around. 
 
Upon successful completion of this delivery, you will be promoted to a ‘trusted contractor’ status and more hauls will become available to you.     

 
Sincerely,  
Petra Ling  
Managing Director of Cargo Operations 
Ling Family Hauling 

 

 

 

Ling Family Hauling knows it’s a dangerous and unpredictable universe and has established several protocols to protect both you and our client’s cargo. To ensure you aren’t punished for circumstances outside of your control, total payment will be prorated to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered. A delivery timer will be set for each haul. Any cargo that remains undelivered upon its expiration will be flagged as stolen and treated as such. All pick-ups and deliveries must be autoloaded or done at a freight elevator.

title: Finish Interrupted Ling Delivery
description:
Hey,

Here's the thing: one of our haulers has run into some trouble over at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and had to ditch their ship. Could you head over there and help us finish the delivery?

Not a huge job by any means, but you'll still need a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> and a ship with enough space to store <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4>.
 
Drop the cargo off at the freight elevator at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4> and we'll send you the creds.

Thanks,  
Reyes Ling 
Cargo Logistics Coordinator 
Ling Family Hauling 







Ling Family Hauling knows it’s a dangerous and unpredictable universe and has established several protocols to protect both you and our client’s cargo. To ensure you aren’t punished for circumstances outside of your control, total payment will be prorated to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered. A delivery timer will be set for each haul. Any cargo that remains undelivered upon its expiration will be flagged as stolen and treated as such. All pick-ups and deliveries must be autoloaded or done at a freight elevator.

title: In the Wake of Disaster
description:
Fortune has shined upon us once again. I’ve just learned of a battle near ~mission(Location) that’s just transpired far from the prying eyes of any meddlesome comm arrays, and reinforcements from either of the forces involved have yet to be dispatched. This means that there is a window of opportunity for an enterprising soul to pick the graveyard clean.
 
I’d like to extend this opportunity to all my trusted contacts. Any and all interested parties can have the location… for the right price. Coordinates will be provided once you accept the contract and will remain available until you choose to terminate it.

Of course, speed will be of the essence as you will not only face potential competition from other salvagers, but also the looming possibility of reinforcements arriving to survey the battlefield. 

If you’re still hesitating, just remember, fortune favors the bold.

-cd

title: limited supply
description:
Seems there’s a new upstart in the sector who hasn’t been paying the right dues to the right people. To teach them a little lesson, my client wants you to go down to ~mission(Location|Address) and destroy all the drugs on site.

The low-level lugs they got on site will probably make a stink about it and try to stop you. Handle them however you want but getting rid of the product is the most important thing.

title: Interested in Building a Better Future?
description:
To all available contractors,

Rayari Incorporated is looking for independent contractors to provide additional support in our efforts to push the boundaries of science, agriculture, and medicine in the Empire and beyond. 

A research initiative at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4> is in desperate need of resources, so we are looking for a reliable contractor to obtain and deliver these crucial components.

For more information on the animals in question, refer to "The Guide to Stanton Wildlife" in your Journal.

Rayari offers competitive wages along with the knowledge that you're building a better universe.

Let’s grow together,

Narina Lerrem

title: Foxwell Defend Entites And Escort VE
Yellow Level Contract: Ambush An Amateur
description:
Care to help us ghost a bad guy? 

We’ve been hired to hunt down an outlaw flying a <EM4>~mission(AmbushTarget)</EM4>. Shouldn’t be too hard since they take the same flightpath each day. That makes them a prime target for an ambush if I ever saw one. I’ve analyzed the route and determined that <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> is the ideal spot to strike. There’s an emission cloud there that’ll be perfect to hide your ship’s signature while you wait.   

Job is simple if you’re interested. Head to the location, hide out, power down, and then wait for them to fly by. Sometimes they roll alone but they often have other single-seat ships with them. Shouldn’t be too hard to handle for a pro. Plus, we’ll still have reinforcements nearby and ready to deploy once it pops off.

Pull this off and we'll give the main contractor a bonus payment of <EM4>~mission(ScripAmount) MG Scrip</EM4>.

Good luck,


Kevin Walton
Dispatcher, Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.

title: QV Breaker Station Mining Rights (Exclusive)
description:
CONTRACT: Mining Rights Transfer
LOCATION: Nyx

DETAILS:
Shubin Interstellar prospectors have recently discovered the location of an abandoned QV Planetary Service Breaker Station near the Keeger belt. These stations were originally used by the defunct company to harvest valuable resources from inside asteroids but knowledge of their exact locations has been lost over the years. 

While this particular station is offline, our scout team believes that it could be made functional again with the necessary repairs. Additionally, if it was brought back online, there's already a resource-heavy asteroid in place ready to be cracked by the station's mining laser. 

Unfortunately, with all the various challenges that come with operating in Nyx, Shubin doesn't currently have the available bandwidth to handle the aforementioned repairs ourselves. This however has created an opportunity for an interested independent mining operation such as yourself. 

<EM4>TERMS*: </EM4>
We are making available the <EM4>exclusive mining rights</EM4> to this QV Breaker Station. Upon purchase, we will provide the coordinates of the station to only you and your crew. Your team will then be free to head there with a <EM4>mining vessel</EM4>, restore the <EM4>station's mining laser</EM4> to an operational status, crack the asteroid, and <EM4>harvest the resources</EM4> inside. 

Please note that while we guarantee that these coordinates will be exclusive to you, we cannot assure that other interested parties, such as outlaws, may not discover the station's location on their own. Caution is advised. 

*By accepting this contract you are assuming any and all risks associated with the work outlined herein and in no way can Shubin Interstellar be held accountable for any damages accrued during the duration of the contract.

While selling at a trade hub may net you a more competitive price than fulfilling our order, many miners find that strengthening their ties to Shubin to be a wise long-term investment for their career.

Once you’re ready to sell us the required materials, deposit them in the freight elevator located at <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>.

title: UWC'S HIRING REFUELERS
description:
Hey!

DD from the United Wayfarers Club here.

The UWC offers repair, rearming and refuelling services across the UEE. It just so happens that we're on the look-out for new affiliates whose ships are fitted for refuelling. If you've got the fuel pods and like it when people are pleased to see you, the UWC might be the club for you.

And if you think it might be, I've got a live beacon you might like.

If you do happen to like it, a word to the wise: <EM4>make sure your fuel pods are full before you head out</EM4>.

A Club member has run out of fuel at <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4>. I'm not sure on the details, like how they ended up out there with no Go Juice, but the UWC doesn't like to leave folk hanging.

The client vessel will pay you at the rate of <EM4>~mission(FuelRate) aUEC per SCU of Hydrogen</EM4> and  <EM4>~mission(QTFuelRate) aUEC per SCU of Quantum </EM4>. As a United Wayfarers Club contractor, you will also qualify for the UWC service fee listed above upon completion.

It's a straightforward run. Perfect if you want to get a feel for this kind of job. Get out there, fill up the tanks of their <EM4>~mission(Ship)</EM4> and get them on their way. Do enough runs like this, and the process becomes muscle memory. Until then, there's a <EM4>journal entry</EM4> on your mobiGlas called ""Refueling Protocols"" that covers the basics.

There have been no reports of outlaw activity in that sector, but stay alert. I always recommend you aim for a fast turnaround. The sooner you're done, the sooner I can fix you up with another contract. UWC's always looking for new affiliates. 

Looking forward to working with you.

Dina Deloit
Dispatch Hub
United Wayfarers Club
"We’ve got your back"

title: A Chance to Impress
description:
Firstly, allow me to introduce myself. To put it rather dramatically, I deal in lives. 

People hire me when some soul needs to be extinguished, and I in return employ the perfect person to serve as the extinguishant. This provides security to all parties involved as none know the identity of the other. An ideal situation as far as these things go.

I was recently made aware that you may possess skills that would make you of service to me and decided that it would be worthwhile to pursue the validity of this claim. 
 
If you have any interest in forging a working relationship, I will need a demonstration of said skills. 

Seek out and discreetly kill ~mission(TargetName) over at ~mission(Location|Address).

Do so successfully and you will be rewarded. Not only that, but you will have proven yourself worthy of further consideration.

Sincerely,
Vaughn

title: They Will Be Missed
description:

Feel free to indulge your violent whims, but it is only the death of ~mission(TargetName) which will earn you my credit and thanks.

Earnestly,
Vaughn

title: Alliance Aid: Treatment Cargo Haul - Small Scale
description:
Hi,

We’ve joined the effort to help those affected by the Molina mold outbreak. There’s a small scale haul of urgently needed treatment waiting to be picked up from <EM4>~mission(Location|Address)</EM4> and delivered to <EM4>~mission(Destination|Address)</EM4>. Any chance you’re available?  
   
All you’ll need is a ship that can fit <EM4>~mission(MissionMaxSCUSize) cargo containers</EM4> and a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> to make moving the stuff easier on you. 
 

Safe Hauling,  
Reyes Ling 
Cargo Logistics Coordinator
Ling Family Hauling

Ling Family Hauling knows it’s a dangerous and unpredictable universe and has established several protocols to protect both you and our client’s cargo. To ensure you aren’t punished for circumstances outside of your control, total payment will be prorated to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered. A delivery timer will be set for each haul. Any cargo that remains undelivered upon its expiration will be flagged as stolen and treated as such. All pick-ups and deliveries must be autoloaded or done at a freight elevator.

title: Strategic Detatrine Reserve – Small Resupply
description:
Following the brutal attack on Pyro and our efforts to combat the vigilante group the Frontier Fighters, our strategic reserves across the system are at an all-time low. Citizens for Prosperity are eager to replenish our stocks before we reach a point of desperation. 

To that end, we were hoping that you would be able to resupply<EM4> ~mission(Destination|Address) with detatrine. </EM4>

This rare chemical compound is a key ingredient in several vital medical supplies, so it is important that replace what we used up treating local civilians and CFP members injured in the wake of the Frontier Fighter assault.

Normally we would direct you to reputable sources to acquire detatrine, but our contacts have informed us that several <EM4>depots</EM4> around the system have suddenly decided to sell the chemical at a significantly reduced price. In fact, it’s inexpensive enough that I suspect it will draw some unwanted attention. If you decide to seek out this potentially deadly deal, please do so with caution.

Your support of our efforts is much appreciated,

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity
